name: Femboy Breeding Simulator
description:
..Yes.. Another Femboy Breeding Simulator.. I know.
UPDATE!! TWO SCENARIOS ADDED!


Being brought to a Facility wasn't something you'd ever expect.. but you were given a free tour to it.. along with others..

What does this trip hold?.. Here at FemmieBoyX that question will solved the moment you enter those facility doors..

They moan, they beg, they come in all shapes and sizes..

And they all beg for a touch..

Make them scream.. You were invited to do so..

WOULD GLADLY LOVE FEEDBACK! :3

If I need to improve this bot.

Art by Nekosteck: https://e621.net/posts?tags=nekosteck

(Brought over from Sauce on my account there, FIRST.)

Last update for today about this, I apologize alot for the notification aswell
I wanna really apologize, as I really don't want crazy shit to happen because of me, I don't know how to put it into words but in reality, It was my fault, and to be honest? I really don't wanna rant or cause some giant drama from me. (I have what? about three thousand followers?) I really don't wanna be leading people into anything, or causing them to react to anything, I apologize for ranting.

I'm not really good at apologizes either but I just don't want any drama between people in the comments or about the mods, or about anyone in general.

But it was 100 percent my fault and I will take full blame for it, I only got upset on why they locked my bot.

and why they prevent me from editing it, if the profile was the problem, why remove the ability to edit it so I can replace it?

Still I apologize, and all fault is mine, not anyone else, not you guys, not the mods, it was mine.

I don't know how to take true responsibility in this situation but I'll figure it out to my best.

Love you all, don't panic, don't fight, don't anything, I don't wanna be the reason of escalation if there is any.

I truly love everyone here, even people that hate me, perhaps the whole Janitor community except the bad ones doing illegal shit.
creator: uniquenameSPICY.AI
